title: Supply Chain Manager - Expeditors India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Expeditors India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Expeditors India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Expeditors India:
Expeditors India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Expeditors India!
